user.title: NanoPID Controller Setup
user.description: Enter the MAC address of your NanoPID device (printed on the label or shown in the device serial log at boot).

data.device_mac: Device MAC Address (12 hex chars, e.g. 24587c5cd104)

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address. Must be exactly 12 hexadecimal characters (e.g. 24587c5cd104).

abort.already_configured: This NanoPID device is already configured.
